author: y4rr
content: [action] Phase 1B dispatch: 6 actually-clean models (DenseNet121, MobileNetV2, MobileNetV3-Small, EfficientNet-B0, Inception-V3, FCN-ResNet50). Refactor 1A helpers, fix tolerance template (per-element allclose), preserve 1A tests. ConvNeXt/Swin/DeepLabV3 contaminated, escalated to #986/#987/#988.
